    U

    UnauthorizedActionException - Exception Class in jogo.exceptions
    Thrown when a player attempts to perform an action or interaction on a structure that belongs to another player.
    UnauthorizedActionException() - Constructor for exception class jogo.exceptions.UnauthorizedActionException
    Constructs a new UnauthorizedActionException with a default error message.
    UPGRADE_MATERIAL - Variable in class jogo.models.Structures.Structures
     
    upgradeStructure(int) - Method in class jogo.models.Structures.City
     
    upgradeStructure(int) - Method in class jogo.models.Structures.Forest
     
    upgradeStructure(int) - Method in class jogo.models.Structures.Mine
     
    upgradeStructure(int) - Method in class jogo.models.Structures.Ranch
     
    upgradeStructure(int) - Method in class jogo.models.Structures.Structures
     
    upgradeStructure(WorldMap, Player, int, int, int) - Static method in class jogo.engine.GameEngine
    Upgrades an existing structure on the map at the specified coordinates.
    UpgradeStructureScreen - Class in jogo.screens
    Controller and view class responsible for rendering structural upgrade paths and statistics comparisons.
    UpgradeStructureScreen(Stage, GameSession, Runnable) - Constructor for class jogo.screens.UpgradeStructureScreen
    Constructs an operational structure upgrade panel framework view.
